holdings.infoBox: EWG is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Siemens Aktiengesellschaft stock at 11.98%, Allianz SE at 8.96%, SAP SE at 8.93%, Siemens Energy AG at 7.26%, and Infineon Technologies AG at 6.37%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Germany ETF (EWG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Germany index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap German companies. EWG was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: German Investor Confidence Jumps on Hopes of End to Middle East Conflict
data.text: Investor confidence improved unexpectedly sharply on hopes the conflict in the Middle East would end soon and energy prices would drop.

data.title: Eurozone Government Bond Yields Fall After U.S.-Iran Deal
data.text: Yields on eurozone government bonds declined as investors lowered their expectations for the ECB raising rates after the U.S. and Iran reached an agreement to end conflict.

data.text: Alongside an anticipated interest-rate hike on Thursday, the central bank is expected to raise its inflation forecast from March, which assumed a swift end to the war in Iran.

data.title: German Factory Orders Fell Back in April
data.text: German manufacturing orders dropped in April, reversing some of the gains in March that came on the back of stock building after the outbreak of the war in Iran.
